falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) with a volume surge exceeding 200% of the 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top pattern would be confirmed, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and indicating a strong bullish breakout contrary to the bottom pattern similarity

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses below the 50-day moving average on high volume (>1.5x average) while price remains below key support at $4,800
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bearish trend reversal would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and disprove the bottom pattern similarity through clear technical breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX volatility index drops below 12.0 while the S&P 500 makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme complacency in volatility despite bullish price action would falsify the 'HOLD' signal by indicating a potential topping phase inconsistent with the bottom pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
